MODULE: cosmos.integration.solana.degen_mob

DESCRIPTION: cosmos DeGen Mob - High-Utility Solana Trading & Intelligence.

"We move faster than the speed of greed."

Features:
- Whale Watching (Wallet tracking)
- Rug Detection (Security analysis)
- Launch Sniping (Log-based execution)
- CT Infiltration (Sentiment loops)
- Cluster Analysis (Wallet Correlatio

CLASSES:
- DeGenMob
  Methods: async def analyze_token_safety(self, mint_address: str) -> Dict
